How to Get Rid of Facial Wrinkles Without Major Surgery

content.text:
Great news — the Houston area offers a wide variety of non-surgical treatments to reduce wrinkles! Here's a comprehensive overview of your options:

---

## 🌟 Non-Surgical Ways to Reduce Wrinkles in the Houston Area

---

### 1. 💉 Botox, Dysport & Jeuveau (Neurotoxin Injectables)

citations.cited_text: Dysport® and BOTOX® Cosmetic are injectable treatments available at our Houston, Texas practice. They are both variations of botulinum toxin A, common...
citations.title: Non Surgical Procedures Houston | Chemical Peels Texas

content.text: Dysport® and BOTOX® Cosmetic are injectable treatments available at Houston, Texas practices. They are both variations of botulinum toxin A, commonly used to treat facial wrinkles.

citations.cited_text: While Botox is FDA-cleared for glabellar lines, it's often prescribed off-label for crow's feet, forehead wrinkles, and bunny lines.
citations.title: Wrinkle Reduction in Houston, TX | The Clinic for Plastic Surgery

content.text: Botox is FDA-cleared for glabellar lines and is often prescribed off-label for crow's feet, forehead wrinkles, and bunny lines.

citations.cited_text: Dysport relaxes the muscles under the skin, similar to BOTOX, but it spreads further, which works great for areas where numerous lines exist, such as ...
citations.title: Dysport Injections - Nonsurgical Wrinkle Treatment - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

content.text: Dysport relaxes the muscles under the skin, similar to BOTOX, but it spreads further, which works great for areas where numerous lines exist, such as crow's feet. Dysport also acts faster, with noticeable results showing within 2–3 days after treatment.

citations.cited_text: These results typically remain for about 3 – 4 months before a follow-up session is needed.
citations.title: Dysport Injections - Nonsurgical Wrinkle Treatment - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

content.text: Results typically remain for about 3–4 months before a follow-up session is needed.

citations.cited_text: Jeuveau can treat lines and wrinkles, which will help give you a more youthful appearance without surgery. With no downtime required, this quick treat...
citations.title: Jeuveau Houston | Wrinkle Treatment Option

content.text: Jeuveau can treat lines and wrinkles to help give you a more youthful appearance without surgery, with no downtime required.

---

### 2. 💆 Dermal Fillers

citations.cited_text: Dermal fillers are injected into the skin in a minimally-invasive procedure that can temporarily augment facial features, add volume, or fill in lines...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: Dermal fillers are injected into the skin in a minimally-invasive procedure that can temporarily augment facial features, add volume, or fill in lines, wrinkles, and facial folds for a smoother, younger-looking appearance. Dermal fillers are typically gel-based hyaluronic acid (HA) formulas that are safe, effective, and offer immediate results.

citations.cited_text: Dermal fillers can be beneficial for filling and smoothing out moderate to prominent facial wrinkles, folds, and creases while still allowing you to m...
citations.title: How to Get Rid of Facial Wrinkles Without Major Surgery

content.text: Dermal fillers can be beneficial for filling and smoothing out moderate to prominent facial wrinkles, folds, and creases while still allowing you to maintain movements and expressions. Many of the most popular formulas are composed of hyaluronic acid (HA), a naturally occurring substance found in our skin.

citations.cited_text: A biostimulatory filler such as Sculptra® can also be advantageous for many patients who are looking for non-surgical options to renew facial aestheti...
citations.title: How to Get Rid of Facial Wrinkles Without Major Surgery

content.text: A biostimulatory filler such as Sculptra® can also be advantageous for patients looking for non-surgical options. Sculptra® can address signs of wrinkles and is particularly known for improving signs of hollowness in the cheeks. It can produce very long-lasting results.

---

### 3. 🔬 Microneedling & Radiofrequency (RF) Treatments

citations.cited_text:
By relaxing the muscles that typically would contract during certain facial movements, neurotoxin injectables have proved to be an effective option

M...
citations.title: How to Get Rid of Facial Wrinkles Without Major Surgery

content.text: Microneedling with SkinPen® is a revolutionary treatment designed to stimulate the skin's natural ability to repair itself by prompting new collagen and elastin production. Over time, it helps reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles and promotes healthier skin.

citations.cited_text: ... Non-surgical chin and jawline enhancement, also referred to as non-surgical chin augmentation, is a transformative cosmetic procedure aimed at ref...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: Profound® is an innovative skin tightening procedure that combines radiofrequency with microneedling for dramatic results. It stimulates your body's own production of hyaluronic acid, collagen, and elastin. Profound can address fine lines and skin imperfections and tighten skin to improve the look of jowls or facial sagging — all with a single treatment and minimal downtime.

citations.cited_text: The INFINI hand piece contains 49 microscopic needles that are deployed through the skin’s surface. Once deployed, the INFINI microneedle tips conduct...
citations.title: Nonsurgical Skin Tightening - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

content.text: The INFINI hand piece contains 49 microscopic needles deployed through the skin's surface. Once deployed, the INFINI microneedle tips conduct radiofrequency energy into predetermined depths of the dermis, a huge advantage over traditional microneedling devices.

---

### 4. 🧪 Chemical Peels

citations.cited_text: If you would like to improve the appearance of your skin by making it look younger and healthier, a chemical peel may be right for you. Different solu...
citations.title: Non Surgical Procedures Houston | Chemical Peels Texas

content.text: If you'd like to improve the appearance of your skin by making it look younger and healthier, a chemical peel may be right for you. Different solutions such as glycolic acid, TCA, phenol, and croton oil are available at different concentrations, each with its own specificity and indication.

citations.cited_text: TCA chemical peels can be particularly beneficial for signs of wrinkles and lines around the mouth. They can be performed in-office.
citations.title: How to Get Rid of Facial Wrinkles Without Major Surgery

content.text: TCA chemical peels can be particularly beneficial for signs of wrinkles and lines around the mouth and can be performed in-office.

---

### 5. 💡 Laser Resurfacing

citations.cited_text: ... Helix CO2 is a unique laser resurfacing treatment that can be used to treat a range of concerns for all different skin types. The three customizab...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: Helix CO2 is a unique laser resurfacing treatment that can be used to treat a range of concerns for all different skin types. The three customizable levels — CoolPeel, Sultra, and FUSION — include both ablative and non-ablative treatments.

---

### 6. 🧵 Thread Lifts

citations.cited_text:
Helix CO2 can tighten skin and treat acne scars, fine lines and wr

Thread lifts are a minimally-invasive treatment that can temporarily lift and tigh...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: Thread lifts are a minimally-invasive treatment that can temporarily lift and tighten the skin on the face and neck, reducing facial lines and folds and improving the contour of the brow, mid-face, and jowls. They are a revolutionary anti-aging treatment because they provide instant facial rejuvenation and beautiful, natural-looking results.

---

### 7. 🔩 Ellacor® (Micro-Coring)

citations.cited_text: Ellacor® is an advanced, non-surgical treatment specifically designed to reduce wrinkles, particularly those on the lower face. It targets common area...
citations.title: Ellacor for Wrinkle Treatment in Houston | Skin Tightening

content.text: Ellacor® is an advanced, non-surgical treatment specifically designed to reduce wrinkles, particularly those on the lower face. It targets common areas such as nasolabial folds, marionette lines, and chin wrinkles.

citations.cited_text: Results are usually visible within one to three months, with long-lasting effects that can maintain an improved skin appearance for several years.
citations.title: Ellacor for Wrinkle Treatment in Houston | Skin Tightening

content.text: Results are usually visible within one to three months, with long-lasting effects that can maintain an improved skin appearance for several years.

> 💡 **Tip:**

citations.cited_text: There is no 'best age' to start treating wrinkles. It all depends on your lifestyle factors and genetics.
citations.title: Wrinkle Reduction in Houston, TX | The Clinic for Plastic Surgery

content.text: There is no "best age" to start treating wrinkles — it all depends on your lifestyle factors and genetics.
Most providers offer free or low-cost consultations to help determine the best treatment plan for your skin type and goals. Always look for a board-certified provider for the safest, best results!
